---
title: "stage_2_intersect_har_biotime_bioshifts"
author: "Shahar Chaikin"
date: "2026-05-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

#1) Load Harmonized Data
Note: In the previous steps, BioShifts was saved as a CSV, while BioTIME was saved as an RDS.
```{r}
# Load BioShifts (adjust path if you ended up saving it as an RDS instead)
bioshifts_harmonized <- read_rds("./stage_1_species_harmo/bioshifts_harmonized.rds")

# Load BioTIME
biotime_harmonized <- read_rds("./stage_1_species_harmo/biotime_harmonized.rds")
```

#2) Intersect Datasets
We will filter BioTIME to only include species that are present in the BioShifts dataset.
```{r}
# Extract the unique, harmonized species from BioShifts
overlapping_species <- unique(bioshifts_harmonized$species_harmonized)

# Filter BioTIME using the %in% operator
biotime_intersect <- biotime_harmonized %>%
  filter(species_harmonized %in% overlapping_species)

# Check how much the dataset was reduced
cat("Original BioTIME rows:", nrow(biotime_harmonized), "\n")
cat("Intersected BioTIME rows:", nrow(biotime_intersect), "\n")
cat("Number of overlapping species:", n_distinct(biotime_intersect$species_harmonized), "\n")

saveRDS(biotime_intersect,"./stage_2_intersect_data/biotime_intersect.rds")
```
